core_mechanism: random-time (Poisson-rate) exchange coupling of otherwise-independent stochastic diffusion processes — a Markov-modulated jump-diffusion in which system states are permuted/swapped at random instants, with the transition density governed by a forward Kolmogorov (master) equation
brief_reason: The abstract describes two independently evolving jump-diffusion particles whose positions are exchanged at random times (a continuous-time replica-exchange), for which it derives a forward Kolmogorov equation for the transition density and compares this random swapping to regime-switching.
